_comment: Public class metadata for the signup system. Non-secret display data only. Calendar IDs and service account credentials are in env vars. Class IDs here must match VALID_CLASS_IDS in lib/google-class-services.js.

classes.description: Create, edit, and share digital content — video, graphic design, photography, and studio production. Project-based sessions in a small-group creative studio setting.
Film highlights, create fan content, and tell sports stories through community media. Small-group sessions combining community participation with media production skills.
